flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at J Sargeant Reynolds Community College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.8k → $11.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at J Sargeant Reynolds Community College rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.0k → $5.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at J Sargeant Reynolds Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at J Sargeant Reynolds Community College fell 26% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.2k → $10.5k).
